Home/Products/Pomodoro Device
25:00
RENDER: Front View

Deep work, simplified

Physical Controls

Tactile knob to set time. Click to start. No screens to distract you.

Offline Cycles

Standard 25/5 min cycles built-in. Works completely without your phone.

No App Needed

Zero digital footprint. No notifications, no syncing, just focus.

Long Battery Life

Weeks of usage on a single charge via USB-C.

Privacy Guarantee

What happens in your room,
stays in your room.

Most smart devices are data vacuums. Micro Bot is different. It has no Wi-Fi chip, no cloud connection, and no storage for recordings. It is physically impossible for us to spy on you.

No Wi-Fi

Zero internet connectivity. Updates happen via USB cable only.

No Cloud

All processing happens on the device's local processor.

No Recording

Microphone data is processed in real-time and instantly discarded.

Technical Specifications

Dimensions80mm x 80mm x 40mm
Weight150g
Battery800mAh Li-ion
ChargingUSB-C
Display7-Segment LED (Orange)
MaterialMatte Polycarbonate

Pomodoro Device
